governingBody: List of books confiscated for violating Criminal Code 86, 86a, 130 or 130a authorities
reasonSummary: Confiscated by the Tübingen Regional Court in March 1999. Unofficial title translation: Fundamentals of Contemporary History - A Handbook on Controversial Issues of the 20th Century
